---
title: "Visitas a puerto - AIS"
author: Jorge F. Cornejo-Donoso
date: last-modified
date-format: "MMMM DD, YYYY"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    lof: true
    lot: true
  pdf: 
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    lof: true
    lot: true
    geometry: "left=3cm,right=3cm,top=2cm,bottom=2cm"
    number-sections: true
    fontfamily: roboto
    prefer-html: true
execute:
  cache: TRUE
  cache.lazy: TRUE
  dev: "ragg_png"
  dpi: 300
knitr:
   opts_chunk: 
     dev: "ragg_png"
     echo: FALSE
     warning: FALSE
     message: FALSE
     cache: TRUE
     cache.lazy: TRUE
     fig.align: 'center'
     fig.width: 7
     fig.height: 4.2
     out.width: "100%"
     #fig.dpi: 600
     fig.pos: "H"

---

```{r results='hide', cache=FALSE}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| paged-print: true
require(ggplot2)
require(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(fishwatchr)
library(lubridate)
library(gfwr)
library(progress)
library(bigrquery)
library(sf)
library(countrycode)
library(viridis)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(tidyverse)

options(scipen=999, 
        digits = 6,
        scales.big.mark = ",",
        scales.decimal.mark = "."
        )

Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "es_ES.UTF-8") 
```

```{r cache=FALSE}
std_base_size <- 9
std_plot_margin <- margin(3, 3, 3, 3, unit = "pt")

gfwT <- theme_gfw() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = std_base_size),
    axis.title = element_text(size = std_base_size),
    axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 4, unit = "pt")),
    axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 4, unit = "pt")),
    axis.text = element_text(size = std_base_size),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = std_base_size, hjust = 1, angle = 45),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = std_base_size),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "white"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = std_base_size, face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title = element_text(size = std_base_size),
    legend.text = element_text(size = std_base_size),
    legend.key.width = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = std_base_size + 1, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 4, unit = "pt")),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = std_base_size, margin = margin(b = 4, unit = "pt")),
    plot.caption = element_text(size = std_base_size - 1, margin = margin(t = 4, unit = "pt")),
    plot.margin = std_plot_margin,
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.08, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.08, "lines"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
  )

theme_set(gfwT)

```

```{r}
load(file="../data/eezs.rda")
```

# Eventos AIS

```{r eval=F}

eezIds <- bind_rows(gfw_region_id("Ecuador"), gfw_region_id("Galapagos")) %>%
  distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  filter(id %in% c(8403, 8431))

years <- 2020:2025
event_types <- c("PORT_VISIT")

n_years <- length(years)
n_tasks <- length(eezIds$id) * length(event_types)

# 2) Barra por año
pbA <- progress_bar$new(
  format = "Procesando años [:bar] :current/:total (:percent) | ETA: :eta",
  total  = n_years,
  clear  = FALSE,
  width  = 60
)

data_list <- vector("list", n_years)

for (yi in seq_along(years)) {

  y <- years[yi]
  pbA$tick()

  # Barra para este año: EEZ x event_type
  pb <- progress_bar$new(
    format = paste0("Year ", y, " (EEZ x tipo) [:bar] :current/:total (:percent) | ETA: :eta"),
    total  = n_tasks,
    clear  = FALSE,
    width  = 60
  )

  # Lista de resultados de este año
  res_year <- vector("list", n_tasks)
  idx <- 0

  for (etype in event_types) {
    for (eez_id in eezIds$id) {

      pb$tick()
      idx <- idx + 1

      eez_label <- eezIds$label[match(eez_id, eezIds$id)]

      dat <- tryCatch(
        suppressMessages(
          suppressWarnings(
            gfw_event(
              event_type    = etype,
              start_date    = sprintf("%d-01-01", y),
              end_date      = sprintf("%d-01-01", y + 1),
              sort          = "+start",
              region        = eez_id,
              region_source = "EEZ",
              duration      = 6 * 60
            )
          )
        ),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )

      # Si no hubo datos o falló la consulta, guardamos tibble vacío con metadatos
      if (is.null(dat) || nrow(dat) == 0) {
        res_year[[idx]] <- tibble(
          year = y,
          eez_id = eez_id,
          eez_label = eez_label,
          event_type = etype
        )
      } else {
        # Agregar metadatos
        res_year[[idx]] <- dat %>%
          mutate(
            year = y,
            eez_id = eez_id,
            eez_label = eez_label,
            event_type = etype
          )
      }

      # opcional: evitar rate limit
      Sys.sleep(0.2)
    }
  }

  # bind_rows une aunque haya columnas distintas (rellena con NA)
  data_list[[yi]] <- bind_rows(res_year)
}

puertosAIS <- bind_rows(data_list)
save(puertosAIS, file="../data/Puertos_ais.rda")
```


```{r}
load(file = "../data/Puertos_ais.rda")

if (!exists("puertosAIS") && exists("eventos")) {
  puertosAIS <- eventos
}

extraer_nombre_puerto <- function(info) {
  anchorage <- purrr::pluck(info, "intermediateAnchorage", .default = NULL)

  if (is.null(anchorage) && length(info) > 0 && is.list(info[[1]])) {
    anchorage <- purrr::pluck(info[[1]], "intermediateAnchorage", .default = NULL)
  }

  nombre <- purrr::pluck(anchorage, "name", .default = NA_character_)

  if (is.null(nombre) || length(nombre) == 0) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }

  as.character(nombre[[1]])
}
```


```{r}
puertosAIS %>% 
          mutate(conVesID = if_else(!is.na(vessel_ssvid), "Si", "No")) %>% 
          group_by(eventId, year, eez_label, event_type) %>% 
          summarise(n = n()) %>% 
          group_by(year, eez_label, event_type) %>% 
          summarise(n = n()) %>% 
          pivot_wider(
            names_from = c(event_type, eez_label), 
            values_from = n,
            values_fill = 0) %>% 
      kable()
```



### Visitas a puerto

```{r}

portVisits <- puertosAIS %>%
  mutate(area_nombre = case_when(
    eez_id == 8403 ~ "Galápagos",
    eez_id == 8431 ~ "Ecuador",
    is.na(eez_id)  ~ "Fuera de EEZ",
    TRUE ~ eez_label
  ),
    year = year(start),
    puerto = map_chr(event_info, extraer_nombre_puerto),
    lat_mean = lat,
    lon_mean = lon,
    barco_id = coalesce(vessel_ssvid, vesselId)
  ) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(puerto), !is.na(barco_id)) %>% 
  group_by(year, eventId, puerto, area_nombre, lat_mean, lon_mean, barco_id) %>% 
  summarise(n = n())

mapPortVisits <- portVisits %>% 
  group_by(puerto, area_nombre) %>% 
  summarise(n = n(),
            meanLat = mean(lat_mean, na.rm=T),
            meanLon = mean(lon_mean, na.rm=T))

write.csv(mapPortVisits, file = "~/Downloads/temp.csv")

```

#### Mapa de visitas a puerto

```{r}
gfw_map(theme = 'dark', res = 10, eezs = TRUE) +
  coord_sf(xlim = c(-95, -77), ylim = c(-5, 5), crs = 4326) +
  geom_point(data = mapPortVisits,
             aes(x = meanLon, 
                 y = meanLat, 
                 col = area_nombre,
                 size = n),      # <-- mapear dentro de aes()
             alpha = .4,
             show.legend = TRUE) +

  scale_size_continuous(
    name = "Número de visitas",
    range = c(1, 10)   # tamaño mínimo y máximo de los puntos
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Zona EEZ",
    values = c(
      "Galápagos" = gfw_palettes$map_presence_dark[3],
      "Ecuador" = gfw_palettes$primary[1],
      "Fuera de EEZ" = gfw_palettes$primary[2]
    )
  ) +
guides(size = guide_legend(
                override.aes = list(color = "#3182bd",  alpha = 0.7)
                        ),
  color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3)))+

  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 4, unit = "pt")), 
    axis.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "white"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 9),
  legend.position = "bottom",
  legend.box = "vertical",
  legend.key.width = unit(0.4, "cm"),
  legend.spacing.x = unit(0.2, "cm"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 9)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Longitud", y = "Latitud")
```



#### Tabla de visitas a puerto

```{r}
portVisits %>% 
  group_by(area_nombre, puerto, eventId, barco_id, year) %>% 
  summarise(n = n()) %>% 
  filter(year >= 2020) %>% 
  group_by(area_nombre, puerto, year) %>% 
  summarise(
    #barcos = n_distinct(barco_id),
    visitas = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>% 
  arrange(year, desc(visitas),puerto) %>% 
  select(year, puerto, visitas) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = puerto,
    values_from = visitas,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>% 
  #slice_head(n = 10) %>% 
  kable(
  #  col.names = c("year", "Zona EEZ", "Puerto", "Número de visitas")
  )

```


```{r}
top10_puertos <- portVisits %>% 
  group_by(area_nombre, puerto, eventId, barco_id, year) %>% 
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
  filter(year >= 2020, year <= 2025) %>% 
  group_by(area_nombre, puerto, year) %>% 
  summarise(
    visitas = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>% 
  group_by(puerto) %>% 
  summarise(
    total_visitas = sum(visitas, na.rm = TRUE),
   .groups = "drop"
  ) %>% 
  slice_max(
    order_by = total_visitas,
    n = 10,
    with_ties = FALSE
  ) %>% 
  pull(puerto)

portVisits %>% 
  group_by(area_nombre, puerto, eventId, barco_id, year) %>% 
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>% 
  filter(year >= 2020, year <= 2025) %>% 
  group_by(area_nombre, puerto, year) %>% 
  summarise(
    visitas = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>% 
  filter(puerto %in% top10_puertos) %>% 
  arrange(year, desc(visitas), puerto) %>% 
  select(year, puerto, visitas) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = puerto,
    values_from = visitas,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>% 
  kable()

```
